title: urena capitata
intro: Urena capitata, also known as the cocklebur or cockleburr, is a plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. Urena capitata is believed to offer health benefits such as relieving fever, reducing inflammation, and supporting kidney function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or tincture, and it is also used in poultices and salves to treat skin conditions and wounds.
